LAW AND MOTION 302, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: PLAINTIFF ROBERT JOHNSON'S MOTION TO COMPEL IS GRANTED IN ITS ENTIRETY WITH EXCEPTION OF ISSUE OF LOG PRIVILEGE. DEFENSE COUNSEL SHALL ALLOW PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL TO REVIEW PRIVILEGE LOG BY MAY 1, 2013. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL MAY FILE ADDITIONAL BRIEF (NOT TO EXCEED 10 PAGES) BY MAY 8, 2013 AND DEFENSE COUNSEL MAY FILE ADDITIONAL BRIEF (NOT TO EXCEED 10 PAGES) BY MAY 15, 2013. THIS MATTER IS CONTINUED FOR FURTHER HEARING TO MAY 28, 2013 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 302. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: PEGGY TSUJIMOTO #5229, 415.828.1919.
